headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Williams Companies, Raises Price Target to $87
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Jason Gabelman   maintains Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $81 to $87.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Williams Companies, Raises Price Target to $83
